violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Containers of food were being stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard lining the shelving in the kitchen is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the stand-up freezer in the back needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Fronts of the fryers and wok station have excess grease build-up and need to be cleaned more thoroughly

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single-use to-go containers on top of the hot window need to be inverted so that the food contact surface is not facing the vent.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors and walls throughout the kitchen and dry storage area need to be cleaned.
